title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - L&T Realty - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
L&T Realty has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About L&T Realty:
L&T Realty is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Realty!
